name: Command Centre Dashboard
label: Dashboard
summary: Dashboard is being rewired away from Command Centre agent snapshots. Manual project status JSON is the first operating model; hooks are deliberately deferred.
blockers: Design lock needs a final retained-or-retired decision before styling/layout work.
Project-owned BTS/NBHW status file paths need to be agreed before automation.
nextActions: Do not reintroduce public/snapshot.json or agent branch snapshots.
Document the design lock decision in CLAUDE.md and docs/UI_RULES.md.

items.title: Decide whether to retain the old dashboard design lock and migrate the golden master locally.
Update BTS manual status after SiteGround captcha/access is cleared.
Agree NBHW project-owned status export fields before wiring hooks.
